name: Chicken & Lima Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of celery soup (10.75 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet.
2. Add chicken; brown well on all sides for about 15 minutes.
3. Arrange chicken in a 2-quart casserole dish.
4. Drain excess fat from the skillet, then stir soup and milk into the skillet.
5. Bring liquids to boil, blending well and scraping to loosen any browned particles in the bottom of the skillet.
6. Add beans, onions, carrots, Worcestershire sauce, and salt to the skillet, mixing well; pour over chicken.
7. Cover and bake at 375°F for 45 minutes.
8. Remove cover; bake until chicken and vegetables are tender for about 15 minutes longer.
